description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a prominent front porch supported by white columns and accented with red shutters on the windows. The house features a gable roof with a large attached garage on one side and a paved driveway leading up to it. The front yard is landscaped with several trees and a tiled walkway, while the backyard includes a wooden deck and a swimming pool. The windows are symmetrically arranged, and the main entryway is highlighted by a covered porch with steps and decorative railings. The exterior walls are finished in light-colored siding, and the roof is covered with dark shingles. The property is surrounded by a mix of deciduous and evergreen trees, enhancing its residential character.
description: A two-story suburban house with a gable roof, red shutters, a front porch with columns, an attached garage, and landscaped yards with trees and a backyard pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a covered porch, red-shuttered windows, attached garage, and driveway.
description_view_1: Side and rear view highlighting the garage, driveway, and a glimpse of the backyard pool and deck.
description_view_2: Backyard view featuring the wooden deck, swimming pool, and rear facade with patio furniture.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the pool, deck, and the side of the house with visible landscaping and driveway.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered front porch with white columns, steps, decorative railings, and a central door flanked by windows.
